text: We have a dream of a society where a hundred cultures bloom.
source_text: Vi har en dröm om ett samhälle där hundra kulturer blommar.

text: When people are given influence and responsibility over their lives and the society in which they operate, the desire to engage is born.

social group

text: Our view of education and school is based on the fact that all children and young people are fundamentally active and creative individuals, with the potential to become solidarity, responsibility and loving adults.

social group
social group

text: Employees in the care of the elderly and other sectors where many are worn out before retirement should have a financial opportunity for shorter working week.

label: social group

text: In the new green folk home, resources are allocated to school and preschool as needed so that each child can complete their education and feel good.

label: social group

text: The party participates in and seeks to develop the struggle of the working class for day demands and cooperates for this purpose with all progressive forces.

text: The Left Party believes that a reduction in working time is more important than a reduction of taxes for a few.

text: Therefore, the Swedish people are faced with an important choice of path that determines the direction of the 1980s policy.

text: Civil society plays a crucial role here.

text: Among other things, efforts are being proposed for those who need the support of society most.

text: With the economy under control, the Left will put the patient at the centre and modernise our healthcare system.

text: where children are not protected from violent films.

text: It should be ensured that the illegal activities of present residents are effectively terminated and it must be monitored that, at the time of their integration, they do not continue a criminal behaviour outside the area.

text: Youth housing must take into account the needs of young people for their own accommodation at reasonable prices.

text: IT is the future - no doubt about it, and in future generations, everyone will probably be able to operate a computer.

text: It is true that the socially disadvantaged father improved his standard of living as much as possible with minimal commitment.

text: This right to work adaptation is not limited to the employer.

text: Administrative burdens and restrictive regulations for self-employed workers in various small contracts are reduced.
source_text: De administratieve lasten en beperkende regelgeving voor zelfstandig werkenden in diverse, kleine opdrachten worden verminderd.

text: Predictive medicine brings new opportunities, but also new risks, especially for solidarity in society.

text: The power of people.

text: Decisions must be adopted by the people's representatives, and the great financial interests, nor the powers must be above democracy.

text: Hopes and the future are increasingly closed to a youth who do not understand their elders, because the elderly do not assume the future of their own society.

social group

text: a. Repeal of the Law on Citizen Security and its replacement by a Law on Freedom and Security that accurately indicates the powers of the police, all the security forces, the rights and duties of citizens and their specific guarantees.
source_text: a. Derogacion de la Ley de Seguridad Ciudadana y su sustitucion por una Ley de Libertad y Seguridad que senale con toda exactitud las competencias policiales, de todos los cuerpos de Seguridad, los derechos y deberes ciudadanos y sus garantias concretas.
label: social group

text: The current agricultural model is not a valid model, as it is aimed at meeting the needs of the market and not at meeting farmers' needs.
source_text: El actual modelo agrario no es un modelo válido pues se dirige a cubrir las necesidades del mercado y no a cubrir las necesidades de las poblaciones agrarias.

text: With a very broad participation of citizens, with enthusiasm, clearly and with a view to the general interests of Spain and the Spanish.

social group

text: Recognition of the importance of the work of the housewife for the national economy.

text: We will promote a quality and attractive professional training, developed largely in the workplaces, which will encourage young people to stay in the education system, expanding their job opportunities.

label: social group

text: Eradicating male violence, eradicating any form of violence against women, is a priority objective for our political formation.

text: The university faculty and researchers may choose to continue in active service until 68 years, if they wish, in accordance with their teaching and research work.

social group

text: The debate on the state of the Autonomies will be preceptively taken before the Senate's full, before a committee session, which will be able to compare representatives of different autonomous communities to value the self-political policy of the government and put particular proposals for action.

text: A practical education, which, because of its public function, responds both to the individual vocation and to the needs of Euzkadi, after a deep socio-economic and demographic analysis of the country.

label: social group

text: We will therefore offer our systemic resistance to actions that seek to neutralize its role in the lives of our people.

text: More than half of Catalans do not know, or know poorly, the Catalan language.

text: You are concelebrated and public servants who depend on you are a more sensitive offensive.

text: Young women – and now more and more young men – are wondering if they can get away with the birth of a child on a professional basis and how they can reconcile their wishes for their professional development and their lives and concerns for children.

text: We also want to actively promote the second decade of the United Nations (UN) for people of African origin in Germany, promote educational projects and strengthen the political participation of black people.

social group

text: We are resolutely opposed to increasing anti-Semitism in our society – no matter who it originates from.

text: They are neither better nor worse citizens than we are and must therefore be incorporated into our legal system.

text: Training interests and the future of an entire generation must not be jeopardised.

text: The offer is aimed at all 30 million wage tax payers and will be worthwhile for many.

text: For those who earn a great deal, we also stick to the three percentage points premium on income tax.
source_text: Für diejenigen, die besonders viel verdienen, halten wir zudem an dem Aufschlag von drei Prozentpunkten zur Einkommensteuer fest.

text: The legal provisions on the duties and rights of the family and its members should be further developed with regard to other forms of life which are often present.

text: Regardless of the level of taxes, further simplifications in tax law save citizens and businesses time and costs.

text: That is why we want to give every person a second chance if they have failed economically or personally.

text: The state must not constantly ask people for information they already have.

text: Economic and social security are indispensable for the free development and self-realization of people.

text: This includes not only research achievements, but also the quality of teaching and the number of students on time for the exam.

text: If the countries of origin refuse to re-enter their citizens, pressure must be exerted on them, for example through the cessation of development aid.

source_text: Das schafft Spielraum, um Menschen zu entlasten und Betriebe wettbewerbsfähig zu halten.

text: to increase the training of medium-sized managers by expanding technical and commercial training institutions;
source_text: Verstärkte Heranbildung mittlerer Führungskräfte durch Ausbau der technischen und kaufmännischen Lehranstalten;
label: social group

text: 1. the economic situation of multi-child families living on a single income has deteriorated significantly in recent years;
source_text: 1. die wirtschaftliche Situation von Mehrkindfamilien, die von einem einzigen Einkommen leben, hat sich in den letzten Jahren entscheidend verschlechtert;
label: social group

text: Repeat offenders are identified safely and quickly by a gene file.
source_text: Wiederholungstäter werden durch eine Gendatei sicher und schnell identifiziert.
label: social group

text: The strengths of non-governmental organisations, particularly their direct access to the population of developing countries, must also be taken into account.
source_text: Weiters sind die Stärken der Nichtregierungsorganisationen, ganz besonders deren direkter Zugang zur Bevölkerung in den Entwicklungsländern, zu berücksichtigen.
label: social group

text: The dual training of young people in the company and at school has proven its worth.
source_text: Die duale Ausbildung von Jugendlichen im Betrieb und in der Schule hat sich bewährt.
label: social group

text: For prevention and security, there will be vouchers for self-defense courses for girls and young women, Let's Empower Austria workshops at schools also for raising awareness of violence protection and the expansion of the "safety-oriented behavior training".
source_text: Zur Prävention und Gefahrenabwehr soll es für Mädchen und junge Frauen Gutscheine für Selbstverteidigungskurse, Let’s Empower Austria-Workshops an Schulen auch zur Sensibilisierung für Gewaltschutz sowie den Ausbau des „Sicherheitsorientierten Verhaltenstrainings“ geben.
label: social group
social group

text: This model is to be followed by all of Austria and will not increase the salaries of politicians.
source_text: Diesem Vorbild soll ganz Österreich folgen und auf die Erhöhung der Politikergehälter verzichten.
label: social group

text: Whoever comes to us as a guest has to behave like a guest.
source_text: Wer als Gast zu uns kommt, der hat sich auch wie ein Gast zu benehmen.
label: social group
